SEARCH
Package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom

Class WaterPrisonBlock

java.lang.Object
net.minecraft.world.level.block.state.BlockBehaviour
net.minecraft.world.level.block.Block
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom.WaterPrisonBlock
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.minecraft.world.flag.FeatureElement, net.minecraft.world.level.block.EntityBlock, net.minecraft.world.level.ItemLike, net.neoforged.neoforge.common.extensions.IBlockExtension
public class WaterPrisonBlock extends net.minecraft.world.level.block.Block implements net.minecraft.world.level.block.EntityBlock
Represents a water prison block that traps and slows entities caught inside it.

The WaterPrisonBlock contains a WaterPrisonBlockEntity that can manage timed behavior or additional state. While inside this block, entities experience heavy movement resistance and gradually lose air, eventually taking drowning damage.

Behavior:

  • Slows entity movement along X, Y, and Z axes.
  • Depletes air supply for living entities and inflicts drowning damage if submerged too long.
  • Uses a BlockEntityTicker for server-side ticking logic.

Usage Example:


 // Inside a wand item use method:
 level.setBlock(targetPos, ModBlocks.WATER_PRISON.get().defaultBlockState(), 3);
Since:
0.1.0

  • Method Details

    • getTicker

      @Nullable public <T extends net.minecraft.world.level.block.entity.BlockEntity> @Nullable net.minecraft.world.level.block.entity.BlockEntityTicker<T> getTicker(@NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.level.Level level, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.level.block.state.BlockState state, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.level.block.entity.BlockEntityType<T> type)
      Provides a ticker for the WaterPrisonBlockEntity.

      The ticker is only active on the server side and will execute the WaterPrisonBlockEntity.tick(Level, BlockPos, BlockState, WaterPrisonBlockEntity) method.

      Specified by:
      getTicker in interface net.minecraft.world.level.block.EntityBlock
      Type Parameters:
      T - the block entity class
      Parameters:
      level - the current world level
      state - the block state
      type - the block entity type
      Returns:
      a ticker function for the water prison entity, or null if not applicable

    • entityInside

      public void entityInside(@NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.level.block.state.BlockState state, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.level.Level level, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.core.BlockPos pos, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.entity.Entity entity, @NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.world.entity.InsideBlockEffectApplier effectApplier)
      Called every tick when an entity is inside this block.

      This method slows the entity’s motion, gradually drains its air supply, and inflicts drowning damage when air runs out.

      Overrides:
      entityInside in class net.minecraft.world.level.block.state.BlockBehaviour
      Parameters:
      state - the block state
      level - the current level
      pos - the position of the block
      entity - the entity inside the block
      effectApplier - the effect applier (unused, but part of the method signature)
